ab: kaṟal tikiy ni isu’.
Watan Nawi cu kung, malapṟow ingkaṟalan mu la.
en: My name is Watan Nawi, and I’m 10 years old.

ab: ima’ ralu’ su’?
Watan Nawi ralu’ mu.
ule’ su’ itaṟal inu’ isu’?
en: What ethnic group are you from?

ab: ule’ cu na Itaṟal kung.
itaṟal kora’ utux moṟow su’?
ch: A:你的家人都是原住民嗎?
en: Are all your family members indigenous?

ab: ho’ wa, Itaṟal kora’ utux moṟow min.
ch: B:是的，我們全家都是泰雅族人。
en: Yes, my whole family is Atayal.

ab: Itaṟal kora’ utux moṟow su’?
ch: A:你的家人都是原住民嗎?
en: Are all your family members indigenous?

ab: aṟat, Itaṟal ka yaba’ mu hiya’, Pamukan ka yaya’ mu.
ch: B:不是，我的爸爸是泰雅族，我的媽媽是漢人。
en: No, my father is Atayal, and my mother is Han Taiwanese.

ab: ule’ su’ ni ima’ ka isu’?
ule’ cu ni Watan Nawi kung.
yaba’ su’ ka haca? pira’ ingkaṟalan ni la?
ch: A:那位是你爸爸嗎? 他幾歲了?
en: Is that your father? How old is he?

ab: matṟu mapgan ingkaṟalan ni la.
yaba’ su’ ka haca? pira’ ingkaṟalan ni la?
ch: A:那位是你爸爸嗎? 他幾歲了?
en: Is that your father? How old is he?

ab: aṟat, nabkis alang min ka hiya’, maspat mapgan ka ingkaṟalan ni la.
ch: B:不是，他是我們部落的耆老，他80歲了。
en: No, he is an elder of our tribe. He is 80 years old.

ab: pira’ ingkaṟalan naka asuṟan su’ malikuṟ la?
malapṟow maspat ingkaṟalan naka asuṟan mu malikuṟ la.
mastuhya’ la ingkaṟalan mamu ci asuṟan su’ malikuṟ?
ch: A:你哥哥年紀比你大很多嗎?
en: Is your brother much older than you?

ab: ṟamagal ingkaṟalan la sa min.
kito’ su’ kinbabawen?
utux kabhul maspatul ka kinbabawen mu.
buse’ ta’ ini’ pakakatox la, ya su’ wal murkes la?
ch: A:好久不見，你是不是長高了?
en: I haven’t seen you in a while. Have you grown taller?

ab: ho’ wa, utux kabhul matul kinbabawen mu la.
wal su’ katuhuṟ la ong?
ini’, makna’u su’ matox la.
mahikang su’ la?
ini’, katuhuṟ cu la.
katuhuṟ su’ la?
ho’, matul toting kinsagan mu micuw la.
